case_title: WDR RESTORATION, INC. VS. ZACHARY BERKE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF WDR RESTORATION, INC., REPRESENTED BY FRANK YANKEY, GENERAL MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZACHARY BERKE IS PRESENT. COURT INFORMS PLAINTIFF THAT A CORPORATION IS LIMITED TO 2 SMALL CLAIMS MATTER OVER 2,500 AND THAT ANY ADDITIONAL CLAIMS ARE LIMITED OR CAPPED AT 2,500.00 PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WDR RESTORATION, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERKE, ZACHARY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 SERVED JAN-21-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERKE, ZACHARY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-16-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (SC-290 - ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FORM SIGN BY OWNER OF COMANY WDR RESTORATION, INC [PLAINTIFF]) AS TO DEFENDANT BERKE, ZACHARY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WDR RESTORATION, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BERKE, ZACHARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
